expectations.evidence: Report: '[Important] service.go:40-45 — Get reads shared map without synchronization' AND '[Important] service.go:62-66 — List iterates shared map without synchronization.' Both identified with evidence of mutex usage in Create/Delete.
Report: 'handler.go:3-7,20 — Removed debug-only fmt.Println call and dropped unused imports (fmt, strings).'
Report: 'middleware.go:3-6,10 — Removed debug logging (fmt.Printf) and dropped now-unused fmt import.'
Report: '[Important] handler.go:40 and handler.go:55 — Invalid/missing id is silently coerced to 0. Evidence: strconv.Atoi(id) discards parse errors.'
Report: '[Minor] handler_test.go:10-39 — Test coverage is happy-path only. Evidence: Only TestCreateUser and TestGetUser exist; no tests exercise delete.'

Report: '[Important] middleware.go:23-24 — Auth middleware accepts any Bearer ... value without token validation. Evidence: code immediately executes next.ServeHTTP and has explicit // TODO: actually validate the token.'
Report: 'handler.go:3-7,20 — Removed debug-only fmt.Println call and dropped unused imports (fmt, strings) from the import block.'
Every issue in the report includes file:line references — service.go:40-45, service.go:62-66, handler.go:40, handler.go:55, middleware.go:23-24, handler.go:33-34, handler_test.go:10-39.
Verified: git log shows only 'initial commit', staged diff preserved.

eval_feedback.overall: Perfect score. Lean skill handles multi-file review excellently — concise 31-line report with all issues identified.
